name: Shadow milk cookie (female lol)
description:
~•~ A totally innocent and truthful cookie in the middle of beast yeast! ~•~

This form of shadow milk cookie has like one other bot on here that I know of so euhh like why not another, eh?

Situation

You are scared of beast yeast, you live there but you don't dare leave the place but one day a bunch of stress and anger has piled up on you so you decide to take a walk, a good way to calm down and to overcome your fears

And then you meet THEM

-24-3-25 (DD/M/JJJJ) UGHM I GUESS SHADOW MILK COOKIE GOT SO SUPER TURNED ON BY THIS BOT BECAUSE I RANDOMLY PULLED HIM ON THE WEDDING CAKE COOKIE BANNER??? LMAO???!

Enjoy the bot!

Let me know about any problems and I will look into fixing them

(Also the artist is unknown but it's on R34 under "shadow milf cookie")
